name: XE Currency Data API
description: Premium exchange rate data from XE.com - trusted globally for 30+ years. Access 220+ currencies from 100+ authoritative sources with unparalleled data quality and brand recognition.
author: Spwig

account_id.label: Account ID
account_id.help_text: Your XE Account ID (not secret - visible in logs)

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help_text: Your XE API Key (keep secure - will be encrypted)

free_tier.name: 7-Day Trial
limitations: Returns MOCK RATES only - not suitable for production
Limited to 100 requests during trial period
Must upgrade for real market data

paid_tiers.name: Subscription Packages
paid_tiers.description: Contact XE for pricing based on your requirements
features: Real-time accurate exchange rates from 100+ sources
Monthly average rates for financial reporting

data_sources: 100+ authoritative global sources aggregated by XE.com
features: Mid-market exchange rates with no hidden markup
30+ years of brand trust and global recognition
Monthly average rates for financial reporting
Trial mode with prominent mock rate warnings
Batch fetching - all rates in one API call
Dynamic capability detection based on subscription

changes: Fixed: Provider now properly inherits from ExchangeRateProviderBase
Fixed: Implemented credential_schema as @property (required abstract method)
Fixed: Changed capabilities from method to @property (required abstract method)
Fixed: Updated validate_credentials signature to raise ValueError (was returning dict)
Fixed: Removed @staticmethod decorators from validate_credentials and redact_credentials
Updated: All alert boxes now use theme-aware CSS classes (messagelist .warning/.info)
Updated: Removed inline CSS styles for better dark/light theme support
Updated: Placeholder credentials changed to generic examples (security)
Provider now loads correctly in ProviderRegistry
Initial release of XE Currency Data API provider
Dual credential authentication (Account ID + API Key)
Trial mode detection with mock rate warnings
Dynamic capability detection based on subscription package
Batch rate fetching with comma-separated targets

notes: Trial accounts return MOCK RATES - not real market data
Prominent warnings displayed for trial mode activation
Contact XE for production pricing and package options
Account info endpoint does not count against quota
Package type determines available capabilities (historical, update frequency, etc.)
Rate limits are package-specific - see account dashboard
